text: Boiled egg is easy to digest and suitable during illness, while fried egg is higher in fat and harder to digest.
During fever, children should consume soft, easily digestible foods and avoid oily or spicy meals.
During viral recovery or fever, hydration and high protein intake are extremely important to support the immune system.
For healthy weight gain in kids, protein-dense and calorie-rich foods like whole eggs, nuts, and lentils should be incorporated daily into balanced meals.
